AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. There being no appearance by either party, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.
